module "function_app_sites_private_endpoint" {
  source  = "terraform.westpac.co.nz/WNZL/module-network-privateendpoint/azurerm"
  version = "~> 1"

  name                = "${local.env.function_app_name}-pe"
  resource_group_name = local.env.resource_group_name
  location            = module.global_variables.azure.location
  resource_id         = azurerm_windows_function_app.function_app.id
  subnet_id           = data.azurerm_subnet.private_endpoint.id
  subresource_names   = ["sites"]
  tags                = local.tags
}

module "wait_for_function_app_dns_sites_reg" {
  depends_on = [module.function_app_sites_private_endpoint]
  source     = "terraform.westpac.co.nz/WNZL/module-network-privateendpoint/azurerm//wait_for_dns_registration"
  version    = "~> 1"

  fqdn              = "${local.env.function_app_name}.privatelink.azurewebsites.net"
  shell_interpreter = "powershell"
}
